member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Services.LeadCommunicator.LeadCommunicatorService
member.summary: Higher-level service that wraps draft + send as two separate activities. Draft and send are separated so the pipeline can checkpoint between them.
Higher-level service that wraps draft + send as two separate activities. Draft and send are separated so the pipeline can checkpoint between them.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Services.LeadCommunicator.LeadCommunicatorService.DraftAsync(RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.LeadPipelineContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Draft personalized email content via Claude. Returns a with Sent = false.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Services.LeadCommunicator.LeadCommunicatorService.SendAsync(RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.CommunicationRecord,RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.LeadPipelineContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send the drafted email via Gmail. Updates and returns the with Sent = true and SentAt.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Services.LeadCommunicator.LeadEmailDrafter.SanitizeClaudeOutput(System.String)
member.summary: Guards against prompt injection succeeding by stripping dangerous content from Claude's output. Returns empty string (template-only fallback) if any dangerous pattern is detected.
